details.test: Task 1: Save three family events under $25 within 10 miles first week of August
Task 2: Subscribe to newsletter with two topics and daily frequency
Task 3: Favorite a highly rated mid-priced restaurant within 5 miles
Task 4: Create reading list of three recent public transportation articles
Task 5: Submit free community event Neighborhood Book Swap
Task 6: Post detailed guest comment on an article with phrase bike lanes
Task 7: Save best coffee deal with at least 20 percent discount expiring this month
Task 8: Contact cheaper of two qualifying 1-bedroom rental listings within 3 miles
Task 9: Plan outing by saving three events in first week of August
